setting.overrideBrief: Defend the designated planets against new Spore Burst mutations in order to secure the Oasis resort worlds for Tier-1 residential development.

NEW STRATEGIC OPPORTUNITY Unmanned spacecraft reconnaissance has identified Illuminate Appropriators on KEID conducting excavation of Un-Democratic Architectural Remains (UARs). UARs have been associated with Exospires and Void emergence. The Helldivers are ordered to interdict these hostiles. Deployments to KEID will be equipped the EXO-49 EMANCIPATOR EXOSUIT in order to combat exo-augmented units.
